_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Discord Bot • NodeJS
author: pterodactyl@stan1712.com
description: Node.js egg for Discord bots with public/private GitHub repo support, auto git pull on startup, npm package management and optional bash pre-start script.
startup: if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install; fi; if [[ ! -z "${START_BASH_FILE}" ]]; then bash ${START_BASH_FILE}; else /usr/local/bin/node /home/container/${BOT_JS_FILE}; fi;

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt -y update
apt -y install -y git curl ca-certificates

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "-- Starting installation..."
echo "-- GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS:-<empty>}"
echo "-- INSTALL_BRANCH=${INSTALL_BRANCH:-main}"
echo "-- USER_UPLOADED_FILES=${USER_UPLOADED_FILES:-0}"

if [ "${USER_UPLOADED_FILES}" = "1" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOADED_FILES}" = "true" ]; then
    echo "-- User uploaded files mode enabled, skipping git clone."
elif [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "-- ERROR: GIT_ADDRESS is empty. Set Git Repo Address in Variables, save, then reinstall."
    exit 1
else
    REPO_URL="${GIT_ADDRESS}"
    case "${REPO_URL}" in
        *.git) ;;
        *) REPO_URL="${REPO_URL}.git" ;;
    esac

    BRANCH="${INSTALL_BRANCH:-main}"

    if [ -n "${GIT_USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
        echo "-- Cloning private repository (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
        AUTH_URL="https://${GIT_USERNAME}:${GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo "${REPO_URL}" | sed -E 's#https?://##')"
        git clone --single-branch --branch "${BRANCH}" "${AUTH_URL}" .
    else
        echo "-- Cloning public repository (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
        git clone --single-branch --branch "${BRANCH}" "${REPO_URL}" .
    fi

    echo "-- Clone complete. Files:"
    ls -la
fi

echo "-- Server installed"

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description: GitHub Repo to clone I.E. https://github.com/name/repo_name

variables.name: Install Branch
variables.description: The branch of the bot to install.

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description: Skip all the install stuff if you are letting a user upload files. 0 = false (default) 1 = true

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files on startup when using a GitHub repo. 0 = false 1 = true (default)

variables.name: Bot JS File
variables.description: The file that starts the bot.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Password to use with git. It's best practice to use a Personal Access Token. https://github.com/settings/tokens

variables.name: Additional Node Packages
variables.description: Install additional node packages. Use spaces to separate.

variables.name: Uninstall Node Packages
variables.description: Uninstall node packages. Use spaces to separate.

variables.name: Start Bash File
variables.description: Specify a custom bash file to be run when starting the server. Git pulls and package installs will still be run first. If set, the bash file will be run instead of running your bot file.
